facebook.caption: Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe on Đường Bạch Đằng is one of those low-key spots that earns its 4.5-star rating simply by doing things right. Whether you're after a cold scoop after a morning at the beach or a proper coffee to start your day, this friendly little cafe hits the spot without any fuss. It's the kind of place locals and visitors keep coming back to, which is always a good sign. Practical tip: it sits in a quieter pocket of town, so it makes a great pitstop if you're exploring the Kp2 neighbourhood on foot.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the scoops land and the iced drinks get poured at Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe, one of Phu Quoc's most reliably loved little cafes. The vibe is relaxed, the portions look generous, and that 4.5-star rating from 325 reviewers is starting to make a lot of sense.

instagram.caption: Cool scoops, good coffee, and a genuine 4.5-star reputation built on 325 reviews. Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe on Đường Bạch Đằng is a sweet little stop worth adding to your Phu Quoc itinerary. Low-key, friendly, and totally worth it.
instagram.video_caption: Scoops, iced coffee, and good vibes on Đường Bạch Đằng. Buddy Ice Cream & Cafe earns every bit of that 4.5-star rating, and the clips prove it.
